title: Po Tsui Park
summary: Po Tsui Park (Chinese: 寶翠公園) is a public park between the communities of Po Lam and Tseung Kwan O Village in New Territories, Hong Kong.
text: Po Tsui Park (Chinese: 寶翠公園) is a public park between the communities of Po Lam and Tseung Kwan O Village in New Territories, Hong Kong.
